name: mcp-stash
description: Claude plugins for consulting client automations, each bundling a local FastMCP server (and Skills) as a one-command install.

plugins.name: imessages
plugins.description: Placeholder/test plugin: proves the package builds, installs, and can see the local iMessage database's existence/metadata (no message content is read).

plugins.name: iphone-history
plugins.description: Placeholder/test plugin: proves the package builds, installs, and can see the local iPhone backup directory's existence/metadata (no backup content is read).
